visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with short, dark hair, wearing a black leather jacket. He is looking down intently, holding a pair of chopsticks in his right hand. In the background, another man in a light-colored suit is out of focus. The setting appears to be a dimly lit restaurant with a cool, greenish-blue color palette. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the top right corner. The audio features a man speaking in a low, slightly gravelly voice. He begins with a calm, inquisitive tone, asking, "阿孝有什么说?" (What did Ah Xiao say?). His voice then shifts, becoming more forceful and demanding as he exclaims, "阿妹讲!" (Little sister said!). The man in the leather jacket gestures with the chopsticks, pointing them forward. The camera pulls back slightly, revealing more of the restaurant interior. The man in the suit, now more in focus, stands in the background, holding a glass. The man in the leather jacket continues to gesture emphatically with his chopsticks, his expression serious. The background shows a wall with various electrical outlets and a poster. The camera remains steady, maintaining a medium shot of the two men.
